mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER ( MEMBER_ID, PASSWORD, NAME, NICKNAME, PHONE, EMAIL, BIRTHDATE, GENDER, ADDR_SIDO, ADDR_SIGUNGU, RESIDE_AREA_CODE, RESIDE_SIGUNGU_CODE, PROFILE_IMAGE_URL, SOCIAL_PROVIDER, SOCIAL_ID, EXP_POINT, TITLE_ID, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{member_id}, #{password}, #{name}, #{nickname}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{birthdate}, #{gender}, #{addr_sido}, #{addr_sigungu}, #{reside_area_code}, #{reside_sigungu_code}, #{profile_image_url}, COALESCE(#{social_provider}, 'LOCAL'), #{social_id}, 0, #{title_id}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, rm.REGION_NAME FROM MEMBER_INTEREST_REGION r JOIN ( SELECT REGION_CODE, MIN(REGION_NAME) AS REGION_NAME FROM REGION_MASTER GROUP BY REGION_CODE ) rm ON r.REGION_CODE = rm.REGION_CODE WHERE r.MEMBER_ID = #{member_id}
SELECT t.*,tm.THEME_NAME FROM MEMBER_INTEREST_THEME T LEFT JOIN THEME_MASTER tm ON t.THEME_CODE = tm.THEME_CODE WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{member_id}
